input: text: PAKISTAN POST: [NAME_OR_ENTITY] parcel [ADDRESS]. [NAME_OR_ENTITY] Rs. 85 today at [LINK] or the parcel will be destroyed.
result_summary: Likely scam: Courier-style content with link, urgency, payment, courier signals. Known courier pattern. Strong scam indicators were found; avoid payments, links, and sharing credentials.
